# Reusable Workflow Skills Documentation

This README file serves as documentation for the reusable workflow skills utilized within the VM2026 project. 

## Overview

The skills defined in this directory are designed to streamline and standardize workflows across the project. They can be reused in various GitHub Actions workflows to ensure consistency and efficiency.

## Usage

To utilize a skill in your workflow, reference it in your workflow YAML file. For example:

```yaml
uses: ./.github/skills/your-skill-name
```

## Available Skills

- **Skill Name 1**: Brief description of what this skill does.
- **Skill Name 2**: Brief description of what this skill does.
- **Skill Name 3**: Brief description of what this skill does.

## Contribution

If you wish to add new skills or modify existing ones, please follow the contribution guidelines outlined in the project's pull request template. Ensure that all changes are documented in the specification file.
